query:
INSERT INTO airbender_batch_commitments (
                l1_batch_number,
                commitment,
                aux_data_hash,
                events_queue_commitment,
                bootloader_initial_content_commitment,
                created_at,
                updated_at
            )
            VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, NOW(), NOW())
            ON CONFLICT (l1_batch_number) DO NOTHING
